title: Book Summary
scenario: Summarize a young adult novel's plot, including the main characters, setting, and conflict. The summary should be 1-2 paragraphs long, written in the third person.
constraints: Should be written in the third person

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary does not include spoilers and is written in the third person.
Verify that the summary includes the main characters, setting, and conflict.
Check if the tone of the summary matches a neutral tone.
